role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market conditions, F/m Investments LLC (the “Adviser”) seeks to achieve the fund’s investment objective by investing at least 80% of the fund’s net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the component securities of the underlying index. The ICE BofA Current 20-Year U.S. Treasury Index is a one-security index comprised of the most recently issued 20-year U.S. treasury note.

info.longName: F/m US Treasury 20 Year Bond ETF
